# kaleido_platform_wfe_stream (Resource)

The Workflow Engine Stream resource allows you to manage streams in the Workflow Engine.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) The environment ID
- `event_processor_json` (String) The event processor configuration as JSON (the type-specific content nested under the event processor type key).
- `event_processor_type` (String) The event processor type for the stream (for example: handler, correlation, transaction_dispatch).
- `event_source_json` (String) The event source configuration as JSON (the type-specific content nested under the event source type key).
- `event_source_type` (String) The event source type for the stream (for example: handler, transaction).
- `name` (String) The name of the stream
- `service` (String) The service ID

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the stream
- `started` (Boolean) Whether the stream should be started.
- `transform` (Attributes) Transform configuration for the stream, including uniqueness prefix, filter, and mapping. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--transform))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Creation timestamp
- `id` (String) Unique ID of the stream
- `updated` (String) Last update timestamp

<a id="nestedatt--transform"></a>
### Nested Schema for `transform`

Optional:

- `filter_jsonata` (String) Optional JSONata condition to evaluate against events to filter them before processing (must return true/false).
- `mapping_jsonata` (String) Optional JSONata mapping to transform events before processing.
- `uniqueness_prefix` (String) A string prefix to prepend to all 'topic' and 'idempotencyKey' values generated by this stream.
